title: Income, deductions, offsets and records
description: What income you need to declare, deductions and offsets you can claim and records you need to prove your claims.
keywords: Income, assessable income, taxable income, deductions, what can I claim, expenses, declare income, declaring income, tax payable, deduction, claiming deductions

child_links.title: Income you must declare
child_links.description: Work out which income you need to declare in your tax return, such as employment, government and investment income.

child_links.title: Deductions you can claim
child_links.description: Find out which expenses you can claim as income tax deductions and work out the amount to claim.

child_links.title: Tax offsets
child_links.description: Check whether you will receive a tax offset and how to calculate it.

child_links.title: Records you need to keep
child_links.description: Records you need to show a payment or expense, the format to keep your records in, and how long to keep them.

child_links.title: Income tests
child_links.description: What income is used to work out your eligibility for some tax offsets and benefits.

child_links.title: Guides for occupations and industries
child_links.description: Occupation and industry guides on income and allowances to declare and the expenses you can claim a deduction for.
